MYSTS2MOD-FORGE_GUARD_POWER.title: Forge Guard
MYSTS2MOD-FORGE_GUARD_POWER.description: Whenever you [gold]Forge[/gold], gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] times the forge amount as [gold]Block[/gold].
MYSTS2MOD-FORGE_GUARD_POWER.smartDescrip: Whenever you [gold]Forge[/gold], gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] times the forge amount as [gold]Block[/gold].
MYSTS2MOD-ENERGY_DOWN_NEXT_TURN_POWER.de: At the start of your next turn, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold].
